top.title: War fuels debate in Cyprus over UK military bases
top.summary: “British Bases Out” is the slogan of Cypriot protesters after a drone strike targeted the RAF Akrotiri airbase.

top.title: Explosion at US embassy in Oslo may have been terrorism, Norway police say
top.summary: Police say they are investigating other motives after the blast caused minor damage to the embassy building.

top.title: Boy, 12, among six dead as tornadoes hit Michigan and Oklahoma
top.summary: The storms uprooted trees, downed power lines, damaged buildings and ripped the roofs off some houses.

top.title: TfL hack in 2024 affected around 10 million people, BBC can reveal
top.summary: TfL insists it has "kept customers informed throughout this incident and will continue to take all necessary action".

top.title: Mayor Sadiq Khan invites embattled AI firm Anthropic to expand in London
top.summary: The letter from London's mayor came as the US moved to designate the company a supply chain risk.

top.title: Xbox confirms new console is coming - but can it revive the brand?
top.summary: Microsoft is the first big company out of the gates with Project Helix - a "next-generation" console.
